query:
SELECT t.id, t.name, t.format, 
  (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM games g WHERE g.tournament_id = t.id) as total_games,
  (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM games g WHERE g.tournament_id = t.id AND g.group_name IS NOT NULL AND g.group_name != '') as games_with_group,
  (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM games g WHERE g.tournament_id = t.id AND g.phase IS NOT NULL AND g.phase != '') as games_with_phase,
  (SELECT GROUP_CONCAT(DISTINCT g.group_name ORDER BY g.group_name) FROM games g WHERE g.tournament_id = t.id AND g.group_name IS NOT NULL AND g.group_name != '') as group_names,
  (SELECT GROUP_CONCAT(DISTINCT g.phase ORDER BY g.phase) FROM games g WHERE g.tournament_id = t.id AND g.phase IS NOT NULL AND g.phase != '') as phases
FROM tournaments t
ORDER BY t.id DESC
LIMIT 5;

  (SELECT GROUP_CONCAT(DISTINCT g.phase ORDER BY g.phase) FROM games g WHERE g.tournament_id = t.id AND g.phase IS NOT NULL AND g.phase != '') as phases
